source.query:
SELECT table_name  FROM information_schema.tables
                      WHERE table_schema='public' 
                      and (table_name like 'fact%' or table_name like 'dim%')
                      and table_name  not like '%_bak_%'
                      and table_name  not like '%_daily%'
                      and table_name  not like '%_weekly%'
                      and table_name  not like '%_monthly%'
                      and table_name  not like '%_history%'

activities.name: load_each_table
activities.description: Load each table from elite archive db to elite-archive container. degree of parallelism is set to 10 and file name is a utc timestamp.

activities.name: Copy given table data from sql server to Elite Archive

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(' 

DECLARE @s VARCHAR(MAX) 

DECLARE @tablename VARCHAR(500) = ''', item().Table_Name ,''' 

 

SELECT @s = ISNULL(@s + '', '','''') + ''['' + c.name + '']'' + '' as [''+replace(translate(c.name,''[,;{}()\=]'',''          ''),'' '','''')+''] '' 

FROM sys.all_columns c join sys.tables t 

ON c.object_id = t.object_id 

WHERE t.name =  @tablename and t.schema_id=1

 

SELECT ''select '' + @s + '' from '' +  @tablename  as Query')

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE='BASE TABLE' and TABLE_SCHEMA = 'dbo'
--and TABLE_NAME in ('tempcnonexpbudget1','temphutc','tempmtlc','temphut','tempmtl')
